title: Breathing World: Horizons
description: Small details that make the surface more dynamic.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aQEV0m81uFE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Crabs** will spawn on the beaches of the world, looking around and running gracefully. Crabs come in different sizes.

**Fireflies** appear in the forests in the evening and fade away in the morning.

**Pollen** appears around the flowers, which scatters around and gives the flowers a beautiful appearance.

### **Commands**
> **/bwh reload** - apply default settings
> 
> **/bwh info** - sends mod settings to chat
> 
> **/bwh crabs _boolean_** - enable/disable crabs (def = true)
> 
> **/bwh fireflies _boolean_** - enable/disable fireflies (def = true)
> 
> **/bwh pollen _boolean_** - enable/disable poolean (def = true)
> 
- > **_boolean_** - true/false
- > **_number_** - 1, 2, 3...
